title: alyssum strigosum subsp. cedrorum
intro: Alyssum strigosum subsp. cedrorum, also known as Mediterranean sweet alyssum or Cedron's alyssum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oil and other compounds. The health benefits of Alyssum strigosum subsp. cedrorum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote better sleep. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
